title: Minimalist Wardrobe Staples for Every Season
author: Favour Adebowale
excerpt: Build a timeless wardrobe with a few high-quality staples you’ll wear again and again.
content:
When it comes to minimal fashion, quality beats quantity. Start by investing in neutral basics — a clean white tee, a tailored blazer, and comfortable yet sharp trousers. Pair them with statement accessories to change the mood.

Key Pieces

  • White tee — breathable cotton
  • Tailored blazer — neutral shade
  • Classic denim — straight or slim

Mix textures and keep colours muted for maximum versatility.

title: How to Style Oversized Hoodies for Smart Casual
author: Sarah Thompson
excerpt: Oversized hoodies aren’t just for the couch — here’s how to make them look intentional and smart.
content:
Pair oversized hoodies with fitted trousers and smart sneakers. Add a long coat or trench for a refined silhouette.

Tip: Keep proportions balanced — oversized on top, slim on bottom.

title: Sustainable Fabrics You Should Know
author: David Michael
excerpt: A quick guide to fabrics that look great and reduce environmental impact.
content: From organic cotton to Tencel, sustainable fabrics are increasingly accessible. Prioritise certifications and learn basic fabric care to prolong garment life.

title: Designing a Capsule Collection — Behind the Scenes
author: Favour Adebowale
excerpt: We open the studio doors and show how a capsule collection comes together.
content: Concept sketches, fabric selection, and prototypes — each step shapes the final collection. Learn how we cut down a large idea into a tight cohesive range.

title: Five Shoes That Upgrade Any Outfit
author: Sarah Thompson
excerpt: Simple shoe choices that instantly elevate your look.
content: From minimal sneakers to leather loafers, the right shoe can refine your outfit immediately. Keep polish and care part of your routine.

title: Travel Packing: Minimalist Tips
author: David Michael
excerpt: How to pack light and look great on the road.
content: Fold smarter, choose multi-use items, stick to a limited colour palette, and always bring a versatile outer layer.

title: Care Guide: Make Your Clothes Last
author: Sarah Thompson
excerpt: Simple care routines that extend garment life and look.
content: Lower washing temp, air dry when possible, and use gentle detergents. Learn mending basics to keep favourites in rotation longer.

title: Accessories: Bags That Actually Work
author: Favour Adebowale
excerpt: Practical and stylish bags to carry your essentials with confidence.
content: From crossbody to utility backpack — choose structure and materials that suit your daily needs.
